organizers.name: Dilip Patil
organizers.title: Marathon Runner & Event Director
organizers.bio: Keen marathoner since 2003. Completed 100+ marathons across India and internationally. Completed 6 world major marathons. Ten-time COMRADES Marathon finisher. International marathons: Mumbai, New York, Chicago, Berlin, Tokyo, Boston, London, Munich, Prague, Jungfrau, Dubai, Du-Médoc, Amsterdam, Abu Dhabi.
